data.body:
## Description
Rewrite plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md to pass all RED tests from task 3bf3-0b65. The rewrite must:

1. Rewrite Phase 1 (Socratic Gap-Fill) to use open-ended questions with follow-ups instead of multiple-choice menus. Remove all rigid (a)/(b)/(c) patterns.
2. Add a new Phase 2.5 (Recommendation Synthesis) that synthesizes project understanding into concrete enforcement recommendations. Each recommendation must cite specific project files or patterns that triggered it and explain why it fits this project.
3. Add test isolation enforcement mechanisms to the recommendation set.
4. Allow user to accept, reject, or discuss each recommendation individually.
5. Ensure artifacts are compatible with check-onboarding.sh (mention ARCH_ENFORCEMENT.md or update check-onboarding.sh references).

SAFEGUARD FILE: plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md is protected per CLAUDE.md rule 18.

## File Impact
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md

## TDD Requirement
Depends on task 3bf3-0b65 (RED). After modification, all RED tests must pass (GREEN).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh 2>&1 | tail -3
- [ ] All tests pass for architect-foundation
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh 2>&1 | tail -3 | grep -q 'FAILED: 0'
- [ ] SKILL.md references recommendation synthesis
  Verify: grep -qi 'recommend' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md && grep -qi 'synthesiz' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md references test isolation
  Verify: grep -qi 'test.*isolation' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md
